svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="ManagementSystem Flowchart" id="UistH213lnZrd3gR_uEE"> <mxGraphModel dx="4636" dy="1843" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="UthX3B4QUjWr_pjLsPhX-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1" value="ManagementSystem Flowchart" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="400" x="500" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UthX3B4QUjWr_pjLsPhX-2" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fillColor=#99FFFF;" value="Start" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="610" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UthX3B4QUjWr_pjLsPhX-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ffff80, #ededed);" value="Initialize ManagementSystem

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 707px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(153, 255, 255), rgb(0, 55, 55)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 80px; margin-left: 618px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 128), rgb(237, 237, 237)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 538px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Initialize ManagementSystem
userList = new ArrayList()
